fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a descriptive code for the map that you set up, for example, BING.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the country/region. If you have selected the country/region code, the name is automatically inserted into this field.

fields.name: Map Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies the URL for the online map.

fields.name: Directions Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies the URL for directions an on online map.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies a comment. The field is optional, and you can enter a maximum of 30 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: URL Encode Non-ASCII Chars
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the URL is Non-ASCII encoded.

fields.name: Miles/Kilometers Option List
fields.tooltip: Specifies the options that measure the route distance.

fields.name: Quickest/Shortest Option List
fields.tooltip: Specifies the option for calculating the quickest or the shortest route.

fields.name: Directions from Location Serv.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the URL for directions from your location an on online map.
